description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push events. The workflow should have three jobs: windows, linux, and static_analysis. The windows job runs on a windows-2019 environment, checks out the repository, generates a project with genie.exe, and builds the engine with MSBuild. The linux job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment, checks out the repository, generates a project with genie, installs required packages, and builds the engine with make. The static_analysis job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment, checks out the repository, installs PVS-Studio if a license is provided, and performs static analysis on the engine code.
